question.string: After whom is the Riemannian geometry named?

query.sparql: SELECT ?item ?itemLabel WHERE { wd:Q172165 wdt:P138 ?item. SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en". } }

question.string: Which animal participated in a military operation with the Australian Defence Force?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?item ?itemLabel
WHERE
{
  ?item wdt:P798 ?militaryDesignation .
  ?item wdt:P7779 ?militaryUnit .
  ?militaryUnit wdt:P17 wd:Q408 .
  FILTER(EXISTS { ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q16521 })
}

question.string: among the characters in the witcher, who has two unmarried partners, Yennefer of Vengerberg and Triss Merigold?
among the founders of tencent company, who has been member of national people’s congress?
among the other representative work of the author of hunter x hunter, which one is talking about middle school student?
On which stock exchanges are Siemens AG shares traded?
Apart from the book series the witcher, name all of the author’s notable work.
are brooke raboutou and colin duffy from same state of the usa?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?brookeState ?colinState
WHERE {
  wd:Q105710357 wdt:P19 ?brookeBirthPlace.
  wd:Q105710356 wdt:P19 ?colinBirthPlace.
  ?brookeBirthPlace wdt:P131 ?brookeState.
  ?colinBirthPlace wdt:P131 ?colinState.
  FILTER ((?brookeState = ?colinState))
}

question.string: What is the boiling point of water?

query.sparql: SELECT ?boilingPoint WHERE { wd:Q283 boilingPoint ?boilingPoint }

question.string: At which school was Yayoi Kusama educated at?
Which High School did Allen Ginsberg attend?
On which island is the Indonesian capital located?
can i play don't starve on play station 4?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?item ?itemLabel WHERE {
  ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q7884720 .
  ?item wdt:P400 "Don't Starve" .
  ?item wdt:P404 ?gameMode .
  ?item wdt:P3195 ?leaguePointsSystem .
  FILTER (?gameMode = "single-player" || ?gameMode = "multi-player") .
  ?item wdt:P400 "PlayStation 4" .
}

question.string: How many General Secretaries of the CPSU were there before Leonid Brezhnev?
How many different presidents of Russia have there been that took the position after 1990?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?president) AS (?count))
WHERE {
  ?president p:P35 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P35 ?position .
  ?position wdt:P279* wd:Q11696 .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?date .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) > 1990) .
}

question.string: Did adam ondra win a medal in the 2020 summer olympics?
Did the Chicago Bulls win at least two seasons of the NBA championship?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?team ?seasonsWon
WHERE {
  ?team wdt:P31 wd:Q39719 .
  ?team wdt:P1813 "Chicago Bulls" .
  ?team wdt:P5138 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P3450 wd:Q82799 .
  ?season wdt:P2522 wd:Q846155 .
  ?team wdt:P2105 ?size .
  FILTER (?size >= 2)
}

question.string: Did Haruki Murakami receive the Nobel Prize in Literature?
Did Kobe Bryant leave the Lakers when LeBron James joined that team?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?start ?end ?lebronStart
WHERE {
  BIND(wd:Q1253 AS ?kobe).
  BIND(wd:Q6270 AS ?lebron).
  BIND(wd:Q160254 AS ?lakers).
  ?kobe p:P54 ?kobeMember.
  ?kobeMember ps:P54 ?lakers.
  ?kobeMember pq:P580 ?start.
  ?kobeMember pq:P582 ?end.
  ?lebron p:P54 ?lebronMember.
  ?lebronMember ps:P54 ?lakers.
  ?lebronMember pq:P580 ?lebronStart.
  FILTER (?lebronStart > ?end).
}

question.string: Did Rawson Marshall Thurber, the director of Red Notice also direct Titanic?
Did Venice at any point belong to the Austrian Empire?
Were at least two of the founders of tencent educated at the same university?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?university (COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?tencent wdt:P112 ?founder .
  ?founder wdt:P69 ?university .
}
GROUP BY ?university
HAVING ((COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder)) > 1)

question.string: Do all of batman’s partner speak english as native language?
How many spouses do head of states have on average?
Was there at least one Formula 1 event on the AVUS?
Find all Turkish verbs ending with “uş” with their lemma.
From which country are the beagles originally from?
From which country came the 2nd most winners of the Emmy Award ?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?country (COUNT(?winner) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?winner wdt:P166 wd:Q190489 .
  ?winner wdt:P27 ?country .
}
GROUP BY ?country
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 2
OFFSET 1

question.string: Does the music style of Helloween belong to rock music?
Does the postal code 32423 belong to Minden?
has adam ondra been a winner of IFSC climbing world cup?
has life expectancy in iran grown in any year after 1999?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?year ?lifeExpectancy ?nextYear ?nextLifeExpectancy
WHERE {
  ?iran wdt:P300 ?year .
  ?iran wdt:P2250 ?lifeExpectancy .
  FILTER (?year > "1999-01-01"^^xsd:date) .
  ?nextIran wdt:P300 ?nextYear .
  ?nextIran wdt:P2250 ?nextLifeExpectancy .
  FILTER (?nextYear = (?year + "P1Y"^^xsd:duration)) .
  FILTER (?nextLifeExpectancy > ?lifeExpectancy) .
}

question.string: has population of Isfahan increased at any point after 2006?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?year ?population
WHERE {
  wd:Q193372 p:P1082 ?populationStatement .
  ?populationStatement ps:P1082 ?population .
  ?populationStatement pq:P585 ?year .
  FILTER (?year > "2006-01-01"^^xsd:date) .
  FILTER (EXISTS {
    wd:Q193372 p:P1082 ?previousPopulationStatement .
    ?previousPopulationStatement ps:P1082 ?previousPopulation .
    ?previousPopulationStatement pq:P585 ?previousYear .
    FILTER (?previousYear < ?year) .
    FILTER (?population > ?previousPopulation)
  })
}

Did Udo Bölts participate in the Tour de France?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?airport) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?airport wdt:P931 ?hamburg .
  ?hamburg wdt:P159 wd:Q1055 .
  ?airport wdt:P2786 ?location .
  FILTER CONTAINS(str(?airport), "airport")
}

question.string: On how many albums does Madonna perform?
On how many albums does Mariah Carey perform?
How many studio albums has Lana Del Rey have?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?album) AS (?num_albums))
WHERE {
  ?album wdt:P175 ?artist .
  ?artist wdt:P735 "Lana Del Rey" .
  ?album wdt:P31 wd:Q470184 .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?album wdt:P957 wd:Q134556 } .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?album wdt:P486 wd:Q202444 } .
}

question.string: In how many years did Kobe Bryant receive an NBA All-Defensive Team award?

How many literary works did Richard Bachman write?
How many notable works does Sarah J. Maas have?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?work) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?author wdt:P9687 "Sarah" .
  ?author wdt:P9688 "Maas" .
  ?work wdt:P50 ?author .
  ?work wdt:P957 ?isbn .
  FILTER (REGEX(STR(?isbn), "^[0-9]{10}$"))
}

question.string: Did Bryan Evenson work for at least one university where he was educated at?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?university ?educatedAt
WHERE {
  BIND(wd:Q2927123 AS ?person)
  ?person wdt:P69 ?educatedAt .
  ?person wdt:P803 ?professorship .
  ?professorship wdt:P361 ?university .
  FILTER (?university = ?educatedAt)
}

}

  ?paul_mccartney wdt:P26 ?linda_mccartney.
  ?child wdt:P22 ?paul_mccartney.
  ?child wdt:P25 ?linda_mccartney.
}

query.sparql:
SELECT ?language ?length WHERE {
  wd:Q30 p:P1813 ?shortName.

question.string: Is After Eight manufactured by Unilever?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?item ?itemLabel
WHERE
{
  BIND(wd:Q39114334 AS ?item) .
  ?item wdt:P1056 ?product .
  ?product wdt:P176 wd:Q211446 .
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" }
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?itemLabel), "After Eight") || ?item = wd:Q39114334)
  FILTER(?item = wd:Q39114334)
  FILTER(wd:Q211446 = wd:Q211446)
}

question.string: Were Angela Merkel and Tony Blair born in the same year?

WHERE {
  wd:Q567 wdt:P569 ?dateMerkel .
  wd:Q1282 wdt:P569 ?dateBlair .
  BIND(YEAR(?dateMerkel) AS ?yearMerkel) .
  BIND(YEAR(?dateBlair) AS ?yearBlair) .
  FILTER (?yearMerkel = ?yearBlair)
}

SELECT ?team ?year
WHERE {
  ?player1 wdt:P54 ?team .
  ?player2 wdt:P54 ?team .
  ?player1 wdt:P569 ?dob1 .
  ?player2 wdt:P569 ?dob2 .

  FILTER (?player2 = wd:Q40311) .

  ?team wdt:P361 ?league .

}

question.string: What came first: the TV show The Flintstones or the end of racial discrimination in voting in the US ?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?item ?itemLabel
WHERE
{
  ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q7254766 .
  ?item wdt:P2768 ?zodiac .
  ?ox wdt:P31 wd:Q7254766 .
  ?ox wdt:P2768 ?ox_zodiac .
  FILTER (?zodiac != ?ox_zodiac) .
  FILTER EXISTS { ?ox wdt:P1545 "ox"@en } .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?middle wdt:P31 wd:Q7254766 .
                     ?middle wdt:P2768 ?middle_zodiac .
                     FILTER (?middle_zodiac != ?zodiac) .
                     FILTER (?middle_zodiac != ?ox_zodiac) .
                     FILTER (?middle wdt:P1545 ?middle_label) .
                     ?middle_label bif:contains "ox" .
                     ?middle wdt:P2541 ?seq1 .
                     ?ox wdt:P2541 ?seq2 .
                     ?item wdt:P2541 ?seq3 .
                     FILTER (?seq1 < ?seq2) .
                     FILTER (?seq2 < ?seq3)
                   }
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" }
}

question.string: What is the combined total revenue of three largest Big Tech companies ordered by number of employees?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?company ?revenue (SUM(?revenueValue) AS ?totalRevenue)
WHERE {
  ?company wdt:P31 wd:Q4830453.
  ?company wdt:P2139 ?revenueStatement.
  ?revenueStatement ps:P2139 ?revenueValue.
  ?company wdt:P112 ?employeeNumber.
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?company wdt:P576|wdt:P577 [] }
}
GROUP BY ?company ?revenue
ORDER BY DESC(?employeeNumber)
LIMIT 3

question.string: Who is older, Sebastian Vettel or Lewis Hamilton?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?person ?age WHERE {
  {
    BIND("Sebastian Vettel" AS ?name1)
    BIND("Lewis Hamilton" AS ?name2)
    ?vettel wdt:P569 ?vettelBirth .
    ?hamilton wdt:P569 ?hamiltonBirth .
    ?vettel wdt:P227 ?vettelName .
    ?hamilton wdt:P227 ?hamiltonName .
    FILTER(?vettelName = ?name1) .
    FILTER(?hamiltonName = ?name2) .
    BIND(YEAR(NOW()) - YEAR(?vettelBirth) AS ?vettelAge) .
    BIND(YEAR(NOW()) - YEAR(?hamiltonBirth) AS ?hamiltonAge) .
    BIND(?vettelAge > ?hamiltonAge AS ?resultVettel) .
    BIND(?hamiltonAge > ?vettelAge AS ?resultHamilton) .
    BIND(IF(?resultVettel, ?name1, IF(?resultHamilton, ?name2, "Both are equally old")) AS ?person) .
    BIND(IF(?resultVettel, ?vettelAge, IF(?resultHamilton, ?hamiltonAge, ?vettelAge)) AS ?age)
  }
}
